inputs.label: Number of Guests
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of attendees at the birthday party.

inputs.label: Cost per Plate (Food)
inputs.businessContext: Catering cost per guest for food, including main course and sides.

inputs.label: Number of Drinks per Guest
inputs.businessContext: Estimated average number of beverages consumed per guest.

inputs.label: Cost per Drink
inputs.businessContext: Average price per drink (non-alcoholic or alcoholic).

inputs.label: Cake Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of the birthday cake, including any custom decorations.

inputs.label: Decoration Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of balloons, banners, tableware, and other decorative items.

inputs.label: Venue Rental Cost
inputs.businessContext: Flat fee for renting the party venue (if applicable).
